title: Exposure Catalog
description: Creative-mode tool to view and manage exposures
body:
### Exposure Catalog is a small addon for [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure).
It adds `/exposure catalog` command, that will open a GUI where all exposures stored in the current world can be viewed, exported or deleted. It also has a **"textures"** mode, where all loaded textures (from Minecraft, mods and resource packs) can be viewed.

Command requires level 3 permissions (cheats enabled in singleplayer covers that).  Needs to be installed on both client and server.
